body_transformation: The bulbous body now features a sleek, electric blue and vibrant yellow striped pattern with neon green circuit-like patterns glowing faintly across its surface. The skull and crossbones symbol on the chest is replaced by a jagged lightning-bolt pattern in glowing neon green, while the curled tail tip now emits faint sparks and has sharp angular fur tips. Clouds surrounding the head transform into crackling energy waves with electric blue and yellow streaks. The short stubby legs now have subtle circuit-like textures on their surfaces, enhancing the wiry, lean frame without altering the quadruped stance.
signature_feature: Spine spikes: jagged lightning-bolt shaped spines with glowing neon green circuit patterns and electric blue energy trails.
